benchmark_name: Swiss QR-Bill synthetic generalization gold obligations
method_note: Rule-based proxy benchmark against a hand-written synthetic gold set. A generated obligation may match multiple granular gold obligations. Not a production compliance evaluation.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: A Swiss QR-bill must include both a receipt and a payment section.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: A Swiss QR-bill must include both a receipt and a payment section.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: The Swiss QR Code must contain payment information needed for invoicing and payment.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: The Swiss QR Code must contain payment information needed for invoicing and payment.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Visible payment information must be available in plain text so the recipient can check it before approval.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Visible payment information must be available in plain text so the recipient can check it before approval.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: For payments with a structured QR reference, the credited account must be a QR-IBAN.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: For payments with a structured QR reference, the credited account must be a QR-IBAN.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: A QR-IBAN can only be used for invoicing and payments in CHF in this QR-bill context.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: A QR-IBAN can only be used for invoicing and payments in CHF in this QR-bill context.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: The QR reference must have 26 numerical characters followed by a modulo 10 recursive check digit.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: The QR reference must have 26 numerical characters followed by a modulo 10 recursive check digit.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: The QR reference must not consist exclusively of zeros.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: The QR reference must not consist exclusively of zeros.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: A QR reference can only be used in combination with a QR-IBAN.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: A QR reference can only be used in combination with a QR-IBAN.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: A Creditor Reference can only be used with an IBAN for invoicing in CHF or EUR.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: A Creditor Reference can only be used with an IBAN for invoicing in CHF or EUR.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: QR-bills must use structured address elements in the Swiss QR Code under the November 2025 requirements.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: QR-bills must use structured address elements in the Swiss QR Code under the November 2025 requirements.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Faulty Swiss QR Code printing can disrupt processing and payment parts can be rejected.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Faulty Swiss QR Code printing can disrupt processing and payment parts can be rejected.
